name: aptner
description: 아파트 중심 부동산 서비스 - 청약정보 + 실거래가 + 핫한 부동산 시각화

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
